header.summary: Review the practitioner's experience, specialties, and availability before you book.

presence.instantDisabled: Instant booking is not enabled yet

availability.heading: Available Times
availability.timezoneNote: Times shown in your local timezone.

booking.panelSubtitle: Choose the time that suits you and continue when you're ready.
booking.slotHint: Sign in as a patient to book a slot.
booking.signInNote: Sign in to your patient account to book this slot.
booking.nonPatientNote: Booking is available for patient accounts only.
booking.createError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
booking.createErrorConflict: This slot is no longer available. Please choose another.
booking.successNote: Your session is reserved for 15 minutes. Complete payment in your sessions page to confirm.

trust.title: Public trust signals grounded in real content
trust.description: This section shows currently available public trust signals for this practitioner, along with related reading that can help you choose your next step with more confidence.

rationale.NO_PUBLIC_REVIEWS: No published public reviews are visible yet.
rationale.LOW_PUBLIC_REVIEW_VOLUME: A limited number of public reviews are visible.
rationale.ESTABLISHED_PUBLIC_REVIEW_VOLUME: This profile has an established base of public reviews.
rationale.RECENT_PUBLIC_FEEDBACK: Public feedback has been updated recently.
rationale.PUBLIC_FEEDBACK_NOT_RECENT: Public feedback exists, but it is not very recent.
rationale.NO_PUBLIC_FEEDBACK_TIMELINE: A public feedback timeline is not available yet.

reviews.title: Published public review snippets
reviews.noText: A public rating is available, but this review does not include a public text snippet.

content.title: Related public reading
content.fallbackExcerpt: Open this article to read the full published content and trust metadata.

nextSteps.title: If this feels like a fit, continue with a clear next step
nextSteps.note: You can start guided matching for a more directed path, or keep reading published articles before booking.
